nodes.label: AI as scheduling assistant for complex logistics
nodes.label_negative: AI as unreliable scheduler causing repetition errors
nodes.grounding_span: It struggles with repeats alot. For example, it will schedule a band twice because it meets a genre need.

nodes.label: AI as brainstorming and idea generator
nodes.grounding_span: I am usually delighted and inspired to find new ideas or ways to accomplish something with the brainstorming.

nodes.label: AI as creative copywriting assistant
nodes.label_negative: Manual ad copy creation without AI
nodes.grounding_span: The ad copy writing assistance has been a great help.

nodes.label: AI as writing assistant for drafting
nodes.label_negative: Personal correspondence kept in own voice
nodes.grounding_span: I keep correspondence solidly in my court.

nodes.label: AI as inventory sourcing advisor
nodes.grounding_span: I have not used AI for shopping for my supplies in the custom creation biz.

nodes.label: Efficiency and time savings
nodes.grounding_span: I would like AI to speed it up and offer several functional options.

nodes.label: Creative fulfillment and discovery
nodes.grounding_span: I enjoy how I can with a phrase go down a rabbit hole and right back out to the next hole.

nodes.label: Personal authenticity and brand
nodes.grounding_span: keeping my correspondence solidly in my voice keeps me centric in my branding.

nodes.label: Mastery and competence
nodes.grounding_span: I am confident that my skills are master level and will never be at risk.

nodes.label: Satisfaction with AI for brainstorming
nodes.grounding_span: I am usually delighted and inspired to find new ideas.

nodes.label: Satisfaction with AI for marketing research
nodes.grounding_span: The ad copy writing assistance has been a great help.

nodes.label: Satisfaction with AI for routine correspondence
nodes.grounding_span: I keep correspondence solidly in my court.

nodes.label: Optimism about expanding AI use for inventory sourcing
nodes.grounding_span: I have not used AI for shopping for my supplies.

nodes.label: Iterative refinement through conversation
nodes.grounding_span: I can go from an intial query and refine it with multiple factors at once.

nodes.label: Sensory and tactile decision-making
nodes.grounding_span: there are so many sensory bits to this that I dont know how to address properly.
